# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Keep instructions concise and actionable.
- Use imperative mood for actions.

## Project Guidelines
- Файли документації (*.md типу DOCUMENTATION.md, TECHNICAL_REQUIREMENTS.md, тощо) не пушити на GitHub - вони для локального використання.
- Automatically run git add, commit, and push to origin/master after making code changes in this repository (oxblackjzz/tablitsya3) without asking for confirmation.
